text.title: Elasticsearch Index Lifecycle Management and Templates Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Is data time-series with a retention policy?

conclusion.verdict: Use plain indices or snapshot/restore for static datasets.

text.example: time_series=true → retention_days>7 AND <=90 → 3-phase ILM. References rule rollover-by-size-or-age.
